entity.label: Jehiel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Hachmonite, a tutor in the family of David toward the close of his reign (1 Chr. 27:32).

nodes.label: Jehiel
nodes.description: A Hachmonite, a tutor in the family of David toward the close of his reign (1 Chr. 27:32).

verses.text: Also Jonathan David’s uncle was a counsellor, a wise man, and a scribe: and Jehiel the son of Hachmoni was with the king’s sons:
